name: BOTS
short_description: BOTS is a high intensity, lightning fast couch coop, solo dev, Indie game. Pit yourself against waves of AI and up to 3 other players in a split screen survival mayhem. Unlock color schemes, levels and new Bots as you play. No downtime, just instant fun!
detailed_description:
Just Updated

1.2.7 2020 July Patriotic Update

Show your colors this Independence / Canada Day with the flashy new Red White and Blue or the stylishly new Red and White, both unlocked with the new Patriotic Achievement.

Not All Equal game mode weapon now reverts back to the starting weapon once your current powerup finishes instead of the default laser.

June Leaderboard reset.


About the Game

BOTS is a high intensity, lightning fast couch coop, solo dev, Indie game. Pit yourself against waves of AI and up to 3 other players in a split screen survival mayhem. Unlock color schemes, levels and new Bots as you play. No downtime, just instant fun!

  • Leaderboards
  • 15 Color Schemes
  • 9 Playable BOTS
  • 9 Procedurally generated Levels
  • 20 Unlockable Achievements
  • 6 Unique game modes

1.2.7 Update now available!
